hot_topics.summary: Updates on SoDex airdrop eligibility checker and appeals.

related_posts.content:
🚨 SoSoValue Season 2 – SoDex Airdrop Checker Update 😱

The SoDex Airdrop Checker is now LIVE, and claims will begin from May 8. Make sure to check whether you're eligible 👇

🔗 Check Allocation 👇 https://testnet.sodex.com/points

If you haven’t filled out the appeal form yet, you can still submit it now to improve your chances of eligibility 👇

🔗 Form Fill https://t.co/HPHhhQqfIS

👉 Users who participated in the SoDex testnet but are marked not eligible can submit the appeal form to get reconsidered.

📊 SoSoValue Season 2 includes 3 snapshots at random times:
• 1 snapshot already completed
• 2nd expected around May 15
• Final snapshot at the end of May

After that → Token distribution + Season 3 begins 🚀

Drop a comment 👇
Are you eligible? And how many points did you earn? 

 #CryptoAirdrop #sodexairdorpchacker #sodexairdropclaim #sosovalueseason2airdorpchacker #sosovalueseason2 #sosovalueeairdorp
